data.title: Zillow and Google partner to provide home-buying guidance on NotebookLM platform; AI revolutionizes decision-making.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Seattle, a partnership between Zillow and Google is revolutionizing how individuals approach significant life choices with the help of AI. The collaboration aims to provide swift, precise, and dependable responses to the intricate decisions involved in purchasing a home. Through an innovative platform called NotebookLM, users can now access valuable guidance to navigate the complex and high-stakes process of home buying. This partnership marks a milestone in leveraging technology to offer efficient solutions to consumers seeking clarity in crucial life decisions.

data.title: Telix Pharma reports strong FY 2025 results with revenue reaching US$803.8M (up 56%), US$157.1M invested in R&D, US$39.5M in adjusted EBITDA. Telix Precision Medicine segment revenue grew by 22% to US$216.4M, maintaining a 64% gross margin. RLS achieved positive adjusted EBITDA contribution, TMS reported a loss of US$21.7M. Telix Therapeutics focused on late-stage assets with significant R&D investment. FY 2026 revenue guidance is US$950M - US$970M. CEO optimistic about growth in Precision Medicine and therapeutic pipeline.
data.description: Telix Pharmaceuticals Ltd announced their financial results for 2025, with revenue of US$803.8 million, growing by 56% from the previous year. They invested US$157.1 million in R&D, had an adjusted EBITDA of US$39.5 million, and a non-material loss before tax of US$5.3 million. The year-end cash balance was US$141.9 million. Telix Precision Medicine segment revenue grew by 22%, with an adjusted EBITDA of US$216.4 million. Telix also made progress in regulatory filings for their products. In the Therapeutics segment, they invested US$98.0 million in R&D for late-stage assets. Telix forecasts 2026 Group Revenue to be between US$950 million to US$970 million with R&D expenditure guidance of US$200 million to US$240 million. Telix continues to focus on strengthening their therapeutic pipeline and expanding Precision Medicine opportunities.

data.title: Blue Owl's recent decision is causing concerns in private credit as investors lose ability to request set fund amounts.
data.description: The recent announcement from a private lender has caused concern within the private credit industry as they disclosed that investors will no longer have the option to request a specific sum of money back from their investment funds. This move has sparked new worries and discussions within the industry.

data.title: Insurance expert explains why auto insurance rates are higher in northern Minnesota compared to other parts of the state due to severe weather.
data.description: In Roseau, Minnesota on February 19, 2026, a recent article aims to explain why auto insurance rates are frequently elevated in northern areas of the state in comparison to elsewhere. The piece discusses various factors contributing to this issue, particularly the impact of severe weather conditions. Through closer examination, drivers are provided insights into the reasons for these regional pricing variations.

data.title: Ecolab Inc declares $0.73 quarterly dividend, record date March 17, 2026, 89th year of dividends. Ecolab: global leader in water, hygiene.
data.description: In Saint Paul, Minnesota, the board of directors of Ecolab Inc. announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.73 per common share. The dividend is set to be paid on April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 17, 2026. This marks the 89th consecutive year that Ecolab has offered cash dividends on its common stock. Ecolab (NYSE:ECL) is recognized as a trusted partner for millions of customers worldwide, specializing in water, hygiene, and infection prevention solutions and services aimed at safeguarding people.

data.title: D. Boral Acquisition I Corp. to commence separate trading of Class A shares and warrants starting Feb 25, 2026.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, D. Boral Acquisition I Corp. revealed that starting February 25, 2026, investors with units from the initial public offering can opt to independently trade the Company's Class A ordinary shares and warrants.

data.title: Imperial Metals Corporation (TSX: III) reports Red Chris' 2025 production: 93,101,213 lbs of copper, 92,429 oz of gold, surpassing 2025 guidance.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 19, 2026, Imperial Metals Corporation shared data on their 2025 metal production from Red Chris mine. The company reported a total of 93,101,213 pounds of copper and 92,429 ounces of gold, marking an increase from the previous year's production of 85,320,618 pounds of copper and 59,811 ounces of gold. This growth was attributed to enhanced grades for both metals and improved gold recovery rates. Red Chris surpassed its production projections for 2025, which were set at 88 million pounds of copper and 86,000 ounces of gold for the year. The company's stock is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol TSX:III.

data.title: Banking expert Mike Augustine discusses the benefits of credit union checking accounts vs. bank accounts in a HelloNation article on Feb. 19, 2026.
data.description: In Gardner, Kansas, a recent article by HelloNation delves into the distinctions between a credit union checking account and a bank checking account. Published on February 19, 2026, the piece aims to answer the question about the disparities between these two financial services. The article provides insights into the fundamental variations, highlighting factors such as account fees, interest rates, and access to ATMs. By shedding light on these differences, it equips readers with valuable information to make informed decisions about managing their finances effectively.
